description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows on the upper level, providing ample natural light and a sleek appearance. The lower level opens onto a spacious patio area, which includes a rectangular swimming pool and is enclosed by low walls for privacy. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and dark brown materials, with clean lines and a boxy structure. The roof includes a small utility structure, likely for HVAC or access. The overall design emphasizes open space, geometric forms, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a private patio with a pool. The exterior features clean lines and a minimalist color palette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large upper windows, patio, and pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, partial view of the pool, and roof utility structure.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a tall, plain wall and the upper story's glass windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of white and brown wall finishes and partial patio visibility.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flush door, no visible porch, and clean geometric lines
